rationale: The cited paper appears only in an appendix note that lists studies excluded from the authors' focal review because they are not empirical tests of conditional promotions (e.g., analytical or conceptual work). It is included as part of a grouped citation list, with no distinct discussion of its findings, mechanism, or implications in the main theorizing, hypotheses, design, or interpretation. This indicates a passing bibliographic mention rather than a meaningful intellectual basis for the 2025 paper.
